$comment: Two tiers. `smoke` = fast CLI validation (no GitHub state). `live` = end-to-end runs that create real fixtures (issues/PRs) in this repo and tear them down. Smoke runs first; live only if smoke fully passes. On any failure (smoke or live), a NEW issue is opened summarizing the failures.

smoke.name: cli.help.no-args
smoke.describe: Engine prints CLI usage when invoked with `kody help`.

smoke.name: cli.help.flag
smoke.describe: Engine prints CLI usage for --help flag.

smoke.name: cli.version.command
smoke.describe: `kody version` prints `kody <semver>` and exits 0.

smoke.name: cli.version.flag
smoke.describe: `kody --version` prints `kody <semver>` and exits 0.

smoke.name: cli.unknown.command
smoke.describe: Unknown top-level command exits 64 (engine's invalid-args code) with a clear error.

smoke.name: cmd.run.missing-flag
smoke.describe: `kody run` without --issue surfaces a clear validation error and exits 64 (validates the run profile loads).

smoke.name: cmd.fix.missing-flag
smoke.describe: `kody fix` without --pr surfaces a clear validation error (validates the fix profile loads).

smoke.name: cmd.fix-ci.missing-flag
smoke.describe: `kody fix-ci` without --pr surfaces a clear validation error (validates the fix-ci profile loads).

smoke.name: cmd.resolve.missing-flag
smoke.describe: `kody resolve` without --pr surfaces a clear validation error (validates the resolve profile loads).

smoke.name: cmd.review.missing-flag
smoke.describe: `kody review` without --pr surfaces a clear validation error (validates the review profile loads).

smoke.name: cmd.plan.missing-flag
smoke.describe: `kody plan` without --issue surfaces a clear validation error (validates the plan profile loads).

smoke.name: cmd.classify.missing-flag
smoke.describe: `kody classify` without --issue surfaces a clear validation error (validates the classify profile loads).

smoke.name: cmd.spec.missing-flag
smoke.describe: `kody spec` without --issue surfaces a clear validation error (validates the spec profile loads).

smoke.name: cmd.research.missing-flag
smoke.describe: `kody research` without --issue surfaces a clear validation error (validates the research profile loads).

smoke.name: cmd.sync.profile-loads
smoke.describe: `kody sync` profile loads. Acceptable outcome: any defined exit (0 success / 1 sync error / 64 invalid args) — but NOT a profile-load crash.

smoke.name: cmd.init.profile-loads
smoke.describe: `kody init` runs the init profile end-to-end on a synthetic empty cwd. Should exit cleanly without a profile-load crash.

smoke.name: cmd.watch-stale-prs.profile-loads
smoke.describe: `kody watch-stale-prs` profile loads and starts (one-shot scan). Acceptable outcome: any exit code so long as it isn't a profile-load crash.

smoke.name: cmd.mission-scheduler.profile-loads
smoke.describe: `kody mission-scheduler` runs one tick (no missions in this repo's .kody/missions = no-op). Validates the new file-based dispatcher is wired.

smoke.name: cmd.mission-tick.missing-flag
smoke.describe: `kody mission-tick` without --mission exits 64 with a clear validation error.

smoke.name: cmd.bug.profile-loads
smoke.describe: `kody bug` profile loads (it requires --issue, so missing-flag = exit 64).

smoke.name: cmd.feature.profile-loads
smoke.describe: `kody feature` profile loads.

smoke.name: cmd.chore.profile-loads
smoke.describe: `kody chore` profile loads.

smoke.name: cmd.ui-review.missing-flag
smoke.describe: `kody ui-review` without --pr exits 64 with a validation error (profile loads).

smoke.name: cmd.release.profile-loads
smoke.describe: `kody release` profile loads. Release workflows are typically only invoked from CI; we just verify it doesn't crash on profile load.

smoke.name: config.validates
smoke.describe: Engine accepts the consumer repo's kody.config.json without complaint when running a no-op-style invocation.

live.name: run.add-api-route
live.describe: kody run on a tiny additive feature issue (add /api/ping route + test). Verifies the run flow opens a green PR end-to-end against the published engine.

fixture.title: [nightly-test {{ts}}] add /api/ping route
fixture.body:
Add a Next.js App Router API route at `src/app/api/ping/route.ts` that handles GET and returns `{ "ok": true }` with HTTP 200 and `Content-Type: application/json`. Mirror the shape of the existing `src/app/api/health/route.ts`.

Add a vitest integration test at `tests/int/ping.int.spec.ts` that invokes the GET handler directly (no HTTP server) and asserts the JSON body contains `ok: true` and the response status is 200. The test must NOT depend on a database — do not gate it with `describeIfDb`.

No new dependencies. Keep changes minimal.
